flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Baton Rouge Community College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $12.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Baton Rouge Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Baton Rouge Community College rose 37% between 2006 and 2009 (2.4% → 3.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Baton Rouge Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (6.9k → 8.4k).
